headline: UHS reaffirms 2026 volume targets, despite seasonal hits in Q1
summary: A weaker-than-expected respiratory season paired with winter storms caused UHS’ volumes to decline in the first quarter. Executives said they expect growth in the second half will help the operator meet earnings targets this year.

headline: Why Is Universal Health Services (UHS) Down 9.0% After Beating Q1 2026 Estimates?
summary: Universal Health Services, Inc. has already reported its first-quarter 2026 results, posting sales of US$4,495.18 million and net income of US$348.68 million, with both basic and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations rising compared with a year earlier. The company’s quarterly performance not only exceeded analyst expectations for revenue and earnings per share, but was also supported by stronger admissions and operating income across its acute care and behavioral health...

headline: UHS Q1 Deep Dive: Outpatient Expansion and Virtual Care Acquisition Define Strategic Shift
summary: Hospital management company Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 9.6% year on year to $4.50 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $5.62 per share was 2.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
